---
title: "RAG & GraphRAG"
date: today
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
---

# RAG & GraphRAG

## Évolution du RAG

```{mermaid}
graph LR
    subgraph "G1 — Vanilla RAG"
        VQ[Query] --> VE[Embeddings]
        VE --> VS[Vector Search]
        VS --> VC[Top-K Chunks]
        VC --> VL[LLM Generation]
    end
    
    subgraph "G2 — Hybrid RAG"
        HQ[Query] --> HE[Embeddings]
        HQ --> HK[Keywords]
        HE --> HS[Vector Search]
        HK --> HS2[BM25 Search]
        HS --> HC[Fusion RRF]
        HS2 --> HC
        HC --> HL[LLM Generation]
    end
    
    subgraph "G3 — GraphRAG"
        GQ[Query] --> GE[Entity Extraction]
        GE --> GG[Graph Traversal]
        GG --> GC[Subgraph Context]
        GC --> GL[LLM Generation]
    end
    
    style VS fill:#1565c0,color:#fff
    style HC fill:#bf360c,color:#fff
    style GG fill:#1b5e20,color:#fff
```

## Vanilla RAG vs GraphRAG vs HybridRAG

| Critère | Vanilla RAG | GraphRAG | HybridRAG |
|---------|-------------|----------|-----------|
| Retrieval | Vector similarity | Graph traversal | Vector + Graph (RRF fusion) |
| raisonnement | Faible (chunks isolés) | Fort (relations explicites) | Modéré à fort |
| Complexité setup | Faible | Élevée (KG construction) | Moyenne |
| Coût indexing | Faible | Élevé (LLM extraction) | Moyen |
| Multi-hop | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Maintenance | Faible | Moyenne (KG updates) | Moyenne |
| Best pour | Q&A simple, FAQ | raisonnement complexe, multi-hop | Cas général production |

## Frameworks GraphRAG

### Microsoft GraphRAG

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Repo | `github.com/microsoft/graphrag` |
| Stars | 25K+ |
| Licence | MIT |
| Approche | Hiérarchique (communautés Leiden) |

**Modes** : Global search (thematic), Local search (entity-focused), DRIFT search (hybrid).

### LightRAG

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Repo | `github.com/HKUDS/LightRAG` |
| Stars | 20K+ |
| Approche | Léger, rapide, support KG existants |

### OG-RAG (Ontology-Grounded RAG)

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Repo | `github.com/microsoft/ograg2` |
| Stars | 105+ |
| Performance | +55% recall, +40% correctness vs baseline |
| Approche | Hypergraph representation, ontology grounding |

### Autres frameworks

| Framework | Spécificité | Repo |
|-----------|-------------|------|
| Nano-GraphRAG | Implémentation simplifiée, hackable | `github.com/gusye1234/nano-graphrag` |
| Graphiti | KG temps réel pour AI agents | `github.com/getzep/graphiti` |
| ApeRAG | Production-ready, MCP, K8s | — |
| DIGIMON | Framework unifié d'analyse | `github.com/JayLZhou/GraphRAG` |
| SubgraphRAG | MLP léger + parallel triple-scoring | `github.com/Graph-COM/SubgraphRAG` |
| Walk&Retrieve | Zero-shot, walk-based traversal, no fine-tuning | `github.com/MartinBoeckling/KGRag` |

## Benchmarks GraphRAG

| Benchmark | Description | Source |
|-----------|-------------|--------|
| GraphRAG-Bench | 16 disciplines, pipeline complet, ICLR 2026 | `graphrag-bench.github.io` |
| DIGIMON | Analyse unifiée des systèmes GraphRAG | arXiv 2503.04338 |
| SimpleQuestion | QA simple (1-hop) | — |
| MetaQA | Multi-hop QA (films) | — |
| GrailQA | Complex QA (Freebase) | — |
| LC-QuAD v2 | Large-scale complex QA | — |
| HotpotQA | Multi-hop reasoning | — |

## Quand utiliser GraphRAG ?

| Cas d'usage | Recommandation |
|------------|----------------|
| FAQ simple, recherche documentaire | Vanilla RAG |
| Q&A multi-hop, raisonnement sur relations | GraphRAG |
| Code base navigation | Vanilla RAG (chunks de code) |
| Knowledge base enterprise complexe | GraphRAG ou HybridRAG |
| Ontologies/RDF existantes | GraphRAG (KG déjà là) |
| Données non-structurées massives | HybridRAG (vector + graph) |
| Temps réel, faible latence | Vanilla RAG ou LightRAG |

::: callout-tip
## Règle de pouce
**GraphRAG si** : vos questions nécessitent de traverser des relations (A→B→C), de raisonner sur des entités connectées, ou d'utiliser des ontologies existantes.
**Vanilla RAG si** : vos questions sont des recherches thématiques simples ("trouve-moi les documents sur X").
:::

## Frameworks RAG découverts automatiquement

<!-- TOOLS_RAG_START -->
### [awesome-llm-apps](https://github.com/Shubhamsaboo/awesome-llm-apps)
100+ AI Agent & RAG apps you can actually run — clone, customize, ship.

⭐ 125.1k | `Python` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-20
**Tags** : `agents`, `llms`, `python`, `rag`

### [claude-mem](https://github.com/thedotmack/claude-mem)
Persistent Context Across Sessions for Every Agent – Captures everything your agent does during sessions, compresses it with AI, and injects relevant context back into future sessions. Works with C...

⭐ 88.0k | `JavaScript` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-20
**Tags** : `ai`, `ai-agents`, `ai-memory`, `anthropic`, `artificial-intelligence`, `chromadb`, `claude`, `claude-agent-sdk`

### [PaddleOCR](https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/PaddleOCR)
Turn any PDF or image document into structured data for your AI. A powerful, lightweight OCR toolkit that bridges the gap between images/PDFs and LLMs. Supports 100+ languages.

⭐ 85.9k | `Python` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-20
**Tags** : `ai4science`, `chineseocr`, `document-parsing`, `document-translation`, `kie`, `ocr`, `paddleocr-vl`, `pdf-extractor-rag`

### [ragflow](https://github.com/infiniflow/ragflow)
RAGFlow is a leading open-source Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) engine that fuses cutting-edge RAG with Agent capabilities to create a superior context layer for LLMs

⭐ 85.5k | `Go` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-20
**Tags** : `agent-harness`, `agentic-ai`, `agentic-retrieval`, `agentic-search`, `ai`, `ai-agents`, `context-engine`, `context-engineering`

### [Flowise](https://github.com/FlowiseAI/Flowise)
Build AI Agents, Visually

⭐ 54.8k | `TypeScript` | Licence: NOASSERTION | MAJ: 2026-07-20
**Tags** : `agentic-ai`, `agentic-workflow`, `agents`, `artificial-intelligence`, `chatbot`, `chatgpt`, `javascript`, `langchain`

### [DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp](https://github.com/DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp)
!DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp MCP server 🌊 🏠 🍎 🪟 🐧 - Code-intelligence engine that indexes a repo into a persistent knowledge graph — functions, classes, call chains, HTTP routes, cross-service lin...

⭐ 33.2k | `C` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-20
**Tags** : `aider`, `ast`, `claude-code`, `code-analysis`, `code-intelligence`, `codex`, `cursor`, `cypher`

### [llm-graph-builder](https://github.com/neo4j-labs/llm-graph-builder)
Neo4j graph construction from unstructured data using LLMs

⭐ 5.0k | `Jupyter Notebook` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-18
**Tags** : `data-import`, `genai`, `graph`, `graph-rag`, `graph-search`, `graphdb`, `graphrag`, `knowledge-graph`

### [FalkorDB](https://github.com/FalkorDB/FalkorDB)
A super fast Graph Database uses GraphBLAS under the hood for its sparse adjacency matrix graph representation. Our goal is to provide the best Knowledge Graph for LLM (GraphRAG).

⭐ 4.8k | `C` | Licence: NOASSERTION | MAJ: 2026-07-20
**Tags** : `cloud-database`, `database`, `database-as-a-service`, `developer-tools`, `devtools`, `graph-database`, `graphrag`, `knowledge-graph`

### [memgraph](https://github.com/memgraph/memgraph)
High-performance open-source in-memory graph database for GraphRAG, AI memory, agentic AI, and real-time graph analytics. Cypher-compatible, built in C++.

⭐ 4.3k | `C++` | Licence: NOASSERTION | MAJ: 2026-07-20
**Tags** : `ai`, `ai-agents`, `ai-memory`, `context-graph`, `cypher`, `enterprise-context`, `graph`, `graph-algorithms`

### [EvoAgentX](https://github.com/EvoAgentX/EvoAgentX)
EvoAgentX is building a Self-Evolving Ecosystem of AI Agents, it will give you automated framework for evaluating and evolving agentic workflows. !GitHub Repo stars

⭐ 3.2k | `Python` | Licence: NOASSERTION | MAJ: 2026-07-20
**Tags** : `agent`, `ai`, `ai-agents`, `llms`, `memory`, `multi-agent-systems`, `natural-language-processing`, `rag`

### [autoflow](https://github.com/pingcap/autoflow)
pingcap/autoflow is a Graph RAG based and conversational knowledge base tool built with TiDB Serverless Vector Storage. Demo: https://tidb.ai

⭐ 3.0k | `TypeScript` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-20
**Tags** : `chatbot`, `cot`, `graphrag`, `knowledge-graph`, `mysql`, `rag`, `serverless`, `vector-database`

### [Awesome-GraphRAG](https://github.com/DEEP-PolyU/Awesome-GraphRAG)
Awesome-GraphRAG: A curated list of resources (surveys, papers, benchmarks, and opensource projects) on graph-based retrieval-augmented generation.

⭐ 2.5k | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-20
**Tags** : `graphrag`, `graphrag-paper`, `graphrag-survey`, `knowledge-graph`, `large-language-models`, `rag`, `retrieval-augmented-generation`

### [comfyui_LLM_party](https://github.com/heshengtao/comfyui_LLM_party)
LLM Agent Framework in ComfyUI includes MCP sever, Omost,GPT-sovits, ChatTTS,GOT-OCR2.0, and FLUX prompt nodes,access to Feishu,discord,and adapts to all llms with similar openai / aisuite interfac...

⭐ 2.3k | `Python` | Licence: AGPL-3.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-20
**Tags** : `agent`, `comfyui`, `dify`, `flux`, `gemini`, `gguf`, `gpt-sovits`, `graphrag`

### [graph-rag-agent](https://github.com/1517005260/graph-rag-agent)
拼好RAG：手搓并融合了GraphRAG、LightRAG、Neo4j-llm-graph-builder进行知识图谱构建以及搜索；整合DeepSearch技术实现私域RAG的推理；自制针对GraphRAG的评估框架| Integrate GraphRAG, LightRAG, and Neo4j-llm-graph-builder for knowledge graph construct...

⭐ 2.3k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-20
**Tags** : `agentic-rag`, `chain-of-exploration`, `deepresearch`, `deepsearch`, `evaluation`, `graphrag`, `graphsearch`, `kg`

### [edgequake](https://github.com/raphaelmansuy/edgequake)
EdegQuake 🌋 High-performance GraphRAG inspired from LightRag written in Rust; Transform documents into intelligent knowledge graphs for superior retrieval and generation

⭐ 2.0k | `Rust` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-20
**Tags** : `graphrag`, `knowledge-graph`, `lightrag`, `rag`

### [Agentset](https://github.com/agentset-ai/agentset)
Open-source production-ready RAG platform with built-in agentic reasoning, hybrid search, and multimodal support. !GitHub Repo stars

⭐ 2.0k | `TypeScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-20
**Tags** : `agentic-rag`, `ai`, `ai-agents`, `ai-sdk`, `chatbots`, `embeddings`, `genai`, `llms`

### [apecloud/ApeRAG](https://github.com/apecloud/ApeRAG)
🐍 ☁️ 🏠 - Production-ready RAG platform combining Graph RAG, vector search, and full-text search. Best choice for building your own Knowledge Graph and for Context Engineering

⭐ 1.3k | `Python` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-17
**Tags** : `agents`, `context-engineering`, `graphrag`, `knowledge-graph`, `mcp`

### [RepoAgent](https://github.com/OpenBMB/RepoAgent)
An LLM-powered repository agent designed to assist developers and teams in generating documentation and understanding repositories quickly !GitHub Repo stars

⭐ 1.0k | `Python` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-17
**Tags** : `agent`, `chatglm`, `chatgpt`, `chatgpt-api`, `gpt`, `gpt-4`, `langchain`, `llama`

### [heymrun/heym](https://github.com/heymrun/heym)
!heymrun/heym MCP server 🐍 📇 🏠 - Source-available, self-hosted AI workflow automation platform. Build multi-agent, RAG, and tool-using pipelines on a visual canvas, then expose any workflow as an M...

⭐ 761 | `Python` | Licence: NOASSERTION | MAJ: 2026-07-20
**Tags** : `ai-agents`, `ai-agents-framework`, `ai-assistant`, `automation`, `automation-tool`, `autonomous-agents`, `coding-agent`, `evals`

### [MindSQL](https://github.com/Mindinventory/MindSQL)
A python package for Txt-to-SQL with self hosting functionalities and RESTful APIs compatible with proprietary as well as open source LLM.

⭐ 445 | `Python` | Licence: GPL-3.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-09
**Tags** : `chatbot`, `gemini`, `langchain`, `rag`, `retrival-augmented`, `text-to-sql`

<!-- TOOLS_RAG_END -->
